Class AppContext

java.lang.Object
shelter.cli.AppContext
public class AppContext extends Object
Compatibility adapter for CLI commands that still call AppContext.get(). The real startup and dependency wiring now live in SystemStartupImpl.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    AdopterApplicationService
    adopterApp()
    Provides access to the adopter application service for orchestrating adopter-related use cases.
    AdoptionApplicationService
    adoptionApp()
    Provides access to the adoption application service for orchestrating adoption request use cases.
    AnimalApplicationService
    animalApp()
    Provides access to the animal application service for orchestrating animal-related use cases.
    AuditApplicationService
    auditApp()
    Provides access to the audit application service for retrieving the system audit log.
    ExplanationService
    explanationService()
    Provides access to the explanation service used to generate natural-language match summaries.
    static AppContext
    get()
    Returns the shared CLI context.
    MatchingApplicationService
    matchingApp()
    Provides access to the matching application service for orchestrating animal-adopter matching use cases.
    ShelterApplicationService
    shelterApp()
    Provides access to the shelter application service for orchestrating shelter-related use cases.
    TransferApplicationService
    transferApp()
    Provides access to the transfer application service for orchestrating inter-shelter transfer use cases.
    VaccinationApplicationService
    vaccinationApp()
    Provides access to the vaccination application service for orchestrating vaccination use cases.

    Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Method Details

    • get

      public static AppContext get()
      Returns the shared CLI context.
      Returns:
      the shared AppContext instance

    • animalApp

      public AnimalApplicationService animalApp()
      Provides access to the animal application service for orchestrating animal-related use cases. Delegates to the underlying SystemStartupImpl instance.
      Returns:
      the animal application service

    • adopterApp

      public AdopterApplicationService adopterApp()
      Provides access to the adopter application service for orchestrating adopter-related use cases. Delegates to the underlying SystemStartupImpl instance.
      Returns:
      the adopter application service

    • shelterApp

      public ShelterApplicationService shelterApp()
      Provides access to the shelter application service for orchestrating shelter-related use cases. Delegates to the underlying SystemStartupImpl instance.
      Returns:
      the shelter application service

    • adoptionApp

      public AdoptionApplicationService adoptionApp()
      Provides access to the adoption application service for orchestrating adoption request use cases. Delegates to the underlying SystemStartupImpl instance.
      Returns:
      the adoption request application service

    • transferApp

      public TransferApplicationService transferApp()
      Provides access to the transfer application service for orchestrating inter-shelter transfer use cases. Delegates to the underlying SystemStartupImpl instance.
      Returns:
      the transfer request application service

    • matchingApp

      public MatchingApplicationService matchingApp()
      Provides access to the matching application service for orchestrating animal-adopter matching use cases. Delegates to the underlying SystemStartupImpl instance.
      Returns:
      the matching application service

    • vaccinationApp

      public VaccinationApplicationService vaccinationApp()
      Provides access to the vaccination application service for orchestrating vaccination use cases. Delegates to the underlying SystemStartupImpl instance.
      Returns:
      the vaccination application service

    • auditApp

      public AuditApplicationService auditApp()
      Provides access to the audit application service for retrieving the system audit log. Delegates to the underlying SystemStartupImpl instance.
      Returns:
      the audit application service

    • explanationService

      public ExplanationService explanationService()
      Provides access to the explanation service used to generate natural-language match summaries. Delegates to the underlying SystemStartupImpl instance.
      Returns:
      the explanation service
